---
name: Token request
about: Request a new token or modification to an existing token
labels: token
---

**Token name (proposed)**
<!-- e.g. color.surface.sunken -->

**Category**
<!-- color / typography / spacing / radius / motion -->

**Proposed value**
<!-- The raw value, or the alias it should point to -->

**Rationale**
<!-- Why does this token need to exist? What component or pattern requires it? -->

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- Did you consider using an existing token? Why doesn't it fit? -->
